title: Theory of Computation - Decidability - Theoretical/Not Answered

questions.question:
Consider the following problems :

Which one of the following is correct?

  1. Only i and iii are undecidable problems
  2. Only ii and iii are undecidable problems
  3. Only i and ii are undecidable problems
  4. i, ii and iii are undecidable problems


UGC NET CSE | December 2018 | Part 2 | Question: 37
options: Whether a finite state automaton halts on all inputs?
Whether a given context free language is regular?
Whether a Turing machine computes the product of two numbers?
